text: Long page below fold (overflow 1755px) — OK for marketing but easy to miss CTAs at bottom
Module names like 'Disconnected strings' not listed on landing — new users may not know what Results will contain
No module search — new users must scroll Summary → Bridge → Faults → Diagnostics groups
No Expand all for diagnostic module groups
Long page (1277px overflow); Diagnostics modules easy to miss under KPIs/bridge/faults
Empty or error state visible to new user
After plot, still 547px scroll — plot toolbar not sticky; constant up/down between pickers and chart
